Title: Successful Login
Preconditions: User exists in the system and provides valid credentials.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the test user's username and password.
3. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged in and redirected to the main application page.

Title: Unsuccessful Login (Invalid Credentials)
Preconditions: User exists in the system but provides invalid credentials.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the test user's username and wrong password.
3. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user remains on the login page.

Title: Unsuccessful Login (Non-Existent User)
Preconditions: User does not exist in the system.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter a non-existent user's username and password.
3. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user remains on the login page.

Title: Successful Data Reading
Preconditions: User is logged in and has access to plant data.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user with access to plant data.
2. Navigate to the data reading page.
3. Verify that the plant data is displayed correctly.
Expected Result: The plant data is displayed correctly on the data reading page.

Title: Empty Data Reading
Preconditions: User is logged in but has no access to plant data.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user with no access to plant data.
2. Navigate to the data reading page.
3. Verify that no plant data is displayed.
Expected Result: No plant data is displayed on the data reading page.

Title: Data Reading with Invalid Data
Preconditions: User is logged in but the plant data is invalid.
Test Data: Plant data with incorrect format or missing values.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user with access to plant data.
2. Navigate to the data reading page.
3. Enter invalid plant data.
4. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the plant data is not saved.

Title: Successful Logout
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Navigate to any page within the application.
3. Click the "Logout" button.
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged out and redirected to the login page.

Title: Failed Logout (Not Logged In)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to any page within the application.
2. Click the "Logout" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user remains on the current page.
